description_long: This is a full-sized acoustic guitar with a natural wood finish on the front soundboard and a contrasting black pickguard. The body features a single cutaway design, allowing easier access to the higher frets. The back and sides of the guitar are finished in a solid black color, providing a striking visual contrast to the lighter wood top. The neck is long and slender, leading up to a headstock with six tuning pegs arranged symmetrically. The bridge and fretboard are both dark, likely made of rosewood or ebony, and the guitar is strung with six metallic strings. The overall construction suggests a robust yet resonant instrument suitable for street performances or casual play in urban environments.
description: A full-sized acoustic guitar with a natural wood top, black back and sides, and a single cutaway body. It features a dark fretboard, six strings, and a headstock with six tuning pegs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the natural wood soundboard, black pickguard, bridge, and all six strings.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the guitar's depth, cutaway design, and the transition between the wood top and black sides.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid black back and the neck extending to the headstock.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again showing the guitar's depth and the cutaway contour.
attribute_headstock_design: Symmetrical headstock with three tuning pegs on each side, no visible logo, standard acoustic shape
